_notes.use_when: the stack runs many scheduled batch jobs (daily reports, periodic scrapes, fixed-time reminders, recurring exports)
_notes.key_idea: cron lane gets a budget model by default. only escalate to high_judgment when the cron job genuinely needs reasoning.
_notes.trade_off: high maxConcurrentRuns is fine when each cron run is cheap. lower it to 2 if any single cron job is expensive.
